description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with sharply angular, swept-back wings and a pointed nose, giving it a stealthy, high-speed appearance. The body is predominantly matte black with subtle blue-tinted windows and accents, suggesting advanced avionics and a possible military or high-tech civilian application. The wings are wide and sharply tapered, with pronounced anhedral angles and no visible winglets, contributing to its aggressive profile. The tail section is integrated into the fuselage with twin vertical stabilizers, each sharply canted outward, and there is no visible horizontal stabilizer, indicating a unique or experimental tail design. The engines are not externally visible, suggesting they may be integrated within the fuselage or wing roots. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed, and features a faceted canopy with blue-tinted glass panels.
description: A futuristic, matte black airplane with sharply swept wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, faceted blue-tinted cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply pointed nose, angular swept wings, and the integrated twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, anhedral wingspan, pointed nose, and the faceted blue-tinted cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the angular wing and tail integration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and the broad, angular wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept delta-like wings with pronounced anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely integrated within fuselage or wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers with no visible horizontal stabilizer, resembling a V-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in any view.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted, blue-tinted canopy; likely single-seat.
